title: Standardization Justification
context: The need for standardizing the new API is uncertain due to unclear frontend adoption.

options.text: I think we should collect evidence of which frontends are likely to use this before committing to a standard.
options.explanation: Calls for gathering data on frontend interest, directly addressing uncertainty.

options.text: Even if some frontends adopt it, the added complexity might slow current projects.
options.explanation: Highlights risk of increased effort for existing tooling.

options.text: We should also consider whether this standard would outlive its initial use cases and remain useful over time.

source_phrase.text: Without a frontend using these new APIs, I don't see a good reason for standardising anything.
source_phrase.function: Challenges whether standardization is justified without expected adoption.
